account_id.title: account_id
account_id.description: Account ID of the customer organisation

admin_name.title: admin_name
admin_name.description: Name of the customer admin (display-only, not stored by flow)

ai_summary.title: ai_summary
ai_summary.description: Structured AI-generated summary of the conversation for human agent review

ai_transcript.title: ai_transcript
ai_transcript.description: Full conversation transcript from the agent session for zero-context handoff

contact_id.title: contact_id
contact_id.description: Contact ID of the authenticated customer admin

issue_summary.title: issue_summary
issue_summary.description: Summary of the customer issue captured during the agent session

user_priority.title: user_priority
user_priority.description: User-confirmed priority from the case form (overrides prediction when provided)

user_product_area.title: user_product_area
user_product_area.description: User-confirmed product area from the case form (overrides prediction when provided)

workday_module.title: workday_module
workday_module.description: Workday module affected (HCM, Financials, Payroll, etc.)
